---
output: hugodown::md_document
title: "Boxed"
date: 2020-09-15
trailer: "gallery/boxed/preview/box_01_20.png"
splash:
  image: "gallery/boxed/image/box_01_20.png"
  caption: "Boxed"
---


```{r include=FALSE}
source("../../diziet.R")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
diziet$make_gallery()
```
